calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar this day for hearing on petition approving compromise of minor's claim. Petitioner present with minor and represented by and through counsel, Michael Kelly, Esq. presents evidence. Good cause appearing, the court grants compromise against University of San Francisco as follows: Compromise: $75,000.00; Costs: $3,396.88; Attorney Fees: $17,900.78; annuity of $50,000.00 to be purchases by the defendant, and paid to minor as follows: At age 14 - $1,000.00 for 4 years; at age 18 - $945.66 for 6 years. Net balance of $3,702.34 to be deposited into a blocked account until the minor reaches age 18. Order signed in open court.
